productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Green Color Can Casual Shoes
description: These lifestyle canvas Color Can shoes from adidas are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for a great casual look.UpperHeavy cotton upper in green for snug Fit and protectionGreen cotton lace-ups with metallic eyelets for snug fitBreathable canvas with carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footPadded canvas tongue for added comfort and snug fitBrand tag appliquéd on the heel for styleMidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with circular lugs in alternating up and down pattern for superior gripAbrasion resistant foxing and toe guard for additional protection and durabilityshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
